Video.summary: Two rival restaurant owners see their competition take a romantic turn.
Video.title: The Rival Hash Houses

Video.summary: Mary Helen Crosby conceals government papers in her umbrella to insure their safe arrival.
Video.title: The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella

Image.alt: The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella

Video.summary: A young man must prove his identity in order to marry the white girl he loves.
Video.title: Swamper Ike

Video.summary: A man arrives in Rawhide, Nevada, spends his last 10 dollars and becomes rich.
Video.title: Little Oscar's Millions

Video.summary: A society belle finds herself living in Carson City, Nev., known as Little Washington.
Video.title: Little Washington

Video.summary: The discovery of a nugget weighing 12 pounds causes an uproar in a California gold town.
Video.title: The Twelve Pound Nugget

Video.summary: Jimmy Dayton hopes to win the hand of a gold-digging dance girl.
Video.title: Jimmy Dayton's Treasure

Video.summary: John Thompson wants to get the mail out during the winters and comes up with ways to make it happen.
Video.title: Snowshoe Thompson

Video.summary: A member of the Laguna tribe refuses to return a venerated portrait to neighboring braves.
Video.title: The Saint's Portrait

Video.summary: A teacher stages a holdup as a joke but decides to make a career of it.
Video.title: Black Bart The PO8

Video.summary: Two partner prospectors sell out to the wealthy Spencer Gates and their lives take different paths.
Video.title: To Big Charlie from Little Charlie

Image.alt: To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie

Video.summary: The story of Cherokee tribesman Sequoia, who developed the Cherokee written language.
Video.title: Sequoia

Video.summary: A grizzled old man charters a train to break the speed record between Los Angeles and Chicago.
Video.title: Death Valley Scotty

Video.summary: A young monk, on his way to the San Gabriel Mission, gets lost and ends up in Death Valley.
Video.title: The Bell of San Gabriel

Video.summary: Bandits board a gold-carrying ship and murder most of the passengers and crew.
Video.title: I Am Joaquin

Video.summary: A recent widower wants a headstone.
Video.title: The Lone Grave

Video.summary: The story of Sacajawea, the Native woman who helped explorers Lewis and Clark.
Video.title: The Girl Who Walked the West

Image.alt: The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West

Video.summary: Scout Kit Carson competes with a trapper for the hand of a Native woman.
Video.title: Spring Rendezvous

Video.summary: A man fights an oyster boat captain.
Video.title: Prince of the Oyster Pirates

Video.summary: Two prospectors pull a hoax on a banker who wants their mine.
Video.title: The Great Diamond Mines

Video.summary: Two Americans on their way to Santa Fe are captured by Mexican troops and held prisoner.
Video.title: Bread on the Desert

Video.summary: Prospectors venture into Death Valley to find a legendary lost mine.
Video.title: A Friend Indeed

Video.summary: A settler must prove an inheritance.
Video.title: The Pieces of the Puzzle

Video.summary: Pike, an irritable trapper, uses his hot temper to save himself from a run-in with Dakota Indians.
Video.title: Tall Heart, Short Temper

Video.summary: Sandy King, the youngest member of an outlaw gang, is wounded.
Video.title: A Mule... Like the Army's Mule

Image.alt: A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule

Video.summary: A set of circumstances prevent friends from keeping control of their potential millions.
Video.title: Ten Day Millionaires

Video.summary: A former outlaw takes the unenviable job of sheriff in a lawless town, and old habits die hard.
Video.title: A Restless Man

Video.summary: Renegade Natives led by a white man named Clay threaten the residents of a decommissioned fort.
Video.title: Long Night at Fort Lonely

Video.summary: Best friends recently out of the U.S. Army use a card game to determine a decision about marriage.
Video.title: A Full House

Video.summary: Two outlaws devise a mining operation and finance it with stolen bullion.
Video.title: How to Beat a Badman

Video.summary: The honeymoon is over when Jim Dayton's wife stumbles onto his past.
Video.title: Jimmy Dayton's Bonanza

Video.summary: A blue-eyed goat named Billy and a mother's ability to bake biscuits help abandoned family members.
Video.title: Biscuits and Billy the Kid

Video.summary: A Mormon leader is determined to enforce God's law with a gun.
Video.title: Son of Thunder

Video.summary: A peace-seeking Native scout aids pioneers besieged by Native renegades.
Video.title: The Visitor

Video.summary: Natives reject Christianity in this biographical tale of missionary priest Jean Baptiste Lamy.
Video.title: Saint of Travelers

Video.summary: There's more than gold in store for prim Wilhelmina Vail when she tackles a claim in Utah territory.
Video.title: Talk to Me, Charley

Video.summary: As a nun aids a wounded robber, she learns he is a friend of the notorious Billy the Kid.
Video.title: Lost Sheep in Trinidad

Video.summary: A land manager tries to outfox two women attempting to rightfully claim their property.
Video.title: By the Book

Video.summary: A spectacular wrinkle develops around an aging marshal's refusal to wear glasses.
Video.title: Ton of Tin

Video.summary: Tiger Lil tries to leave her dance hall days behind her, but Frank Johnson won't give up on her.
Video.title: Lady with a Past

Video.summary: After a trip to town, two miners find gold nuggets mixed with beans they bought.
Video.title: The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

Image.alt: The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

Video.summary: A cowboy and a Native man join forces to secure dowries for their sweethearts.
Video.title: Amos and the Black Bull

Video.summary: A sheriff in Tucson pursues bank robbers and $62,000 in cash, which has been hidden.
Video.title: Up the Chimney
